story.iWant: MinimalCalc.lua to calculate spell/DOT/totem damage from gem level progression data
story.soThat: all 15 realistic builds produce DPS > 0 and Epic 2 validation achieves 100% success rate

subtasks.subtask: Study CalcOffence.lua spell damage formulas in external/pob-engine
Understand grantedEffect.levels structure and data format
Map gem stat IDs to base damage values (identify which stats = spell damage)
Create debug script to inspect spell gem data structure
Document findings: which Lua tables to access, data format, calculation order

task.title: Enhance MinimalCalc.lua for Spell Base Damage

subtasks.subtask: Add spell base damage extraction from grantedEffect.levels[level]
Implement spell effectiveness calculation
Add spell crit and cast speed modifiers
Handle spell flags in CalcOffence pipeline
Implement DOT base damage calculation
Add DOT duration and ailment damage formulas
Test with ONE spell build first (e.g., witch_frost_mage_91)
Implement totem damage multipliers
Route totem skills through appropriate calculation path
Handle minion skills (or implement graceful degradation)
Test totem builds: titan_totem_90, warrior_ballista_93
Document any unsupported skill types
Create test suite: test_story_2_9_2_spell_builds.py
Test all 11 spell/DOT/totem builds individually
Verify 100% success rate (15/15 builds DPS > 0)
Run regression tests on weapon builds (no breakage)
Run Epic 2 validation suite (≥70% success, ≥5% improvement)
Measure performance: <500ms per calculation target
Document results in validation report

requirements.requirement: MinimalCalc.lua accesses grantedEffect.levels[skillLevel] for spell gems
Extracts base damage values from gem stat progression
Applies spell damage effectiveness multipliers
Handles spell crit, cast speed, and mana cost calculations
DOT skills calculate base damage over time
Ailment damage formulas applied (ignite, poison, bleed if applicable to PoE 2)
DOT duration and damage multipliers handled correctly
DOT skills return non-zero DPS values
Totem skills route through totem damage pipeline
Minion skills handled appropriately (or explicitly marked as unsupported with graceful degradation)
Totem/minion builds produce DPS > 0 or graceful error message
All 11 spell/DOT/totem builds produce DPS > 0
Validation results documented in test results

Builds tested: bloodmage_remnants_95, gemling_frost_mage_100, witch_frost_mage_91, titan_totem_90, warrior_ballista_93, lich_frost_mage_90, lich_storm_mage_90, ritualist_lightning_spear_96, titan_infernal_cry_72, witch_essence_drain_86, titan_falling_thunder_99
Success rate: 100% (15/15 builds produce DPS > 0)
Median improvement: ≥5% when optimizer runs with unallocated points
Budget constraints: Zero violations across all optimizations
Performance: All build calculations complete <500ms per calculation
All 4 weapon builds from Story 2.9.1 Phase 1 continue to work correctly
DPS values remain stable (within 5% variance acceptable)
Test suite: test_story_2_9_1_phase1_weapons.py continues to pass

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Epic 2 implements the core optimization engine, building on Epic 1's proven 2ms-per-calculation performance. Target outcome is 5-15% median improvement in user metrics while completing within 5 minutes. Zero modifications to Epic 1 code expected.

doc.title: Calculation Gap Analysis (Revised)
doc.snippet: PoB 2 already has complete data files: Data/Gems.lua (438KB, spell base damage by level) already loaded by MinimalCalc. SkillStatMap.lua provides skill modifiers. Data files have minimal GUI dependencies.

doc.title: Story 2.9.1: Hybrid Calculation Approach
doc.snippet: Story 2.9.1 achieved partial completion with critical infrastructure: Hybrid routing operational, skill detection accurate (8/8 tests), 4/15 weapon builds working. Phase 2 (spell/DOT support) blocked on MinimalCalc enhancements.

doc.title: Story 2.9.1 SM Handoff
doc.snippet: Handoff document proposing Story 2.9.2 to complete spell/DOT/totem support. Infrastructure ready, only spell calculation formulas missing in MinimalCalc.lua.

doc.title: Solution Architecture
doc.snippet: Epic 2 optimizer module consumes Epic 1 calculator API. Zero modifications to Epic 1 code (calculator, parsers, models are stable APIs). No circular dependencies.

doc.title: Testing Coverage Standards
doc.snippet: Integration tests for Epic 2 validation. Realistic builds test coverage. Performance benchmarking standards.

doc.title: PoB CalcOffence Module
doc.snippet: Reference implementation for spell damage calculation, spell effectiveness, crit, and DOT formulas. MinimalCalc must replicate subset of this logic.

doc.title: PoB Gem Data
doc.snippet: 438KB file containing all gem data including spell base damage by level. Already loaded by MinimalCalc (line 415). Contains grantedEffect.levels structure.

artifact.reason: Creates activeEffect for gems with skill flags. Critical for spell detection. Already sets up skillFlags structure needed for spell routing.
Extracts calculation results from env.player.output. Currently uses player.output, not mainSkill.output. Spell damage will need to populate mainSkill.output.TotalDPS.
Hybrid routing entry point. Routes attack vs spell skills to appropriate calculator. Already operational from Story 2.9.1.
Fallback calculator for complex skills. Provides process isolation for full PoB engine. Already implemented in Story 2.9.1.
Python interface to MinimalCalc.lua. May need additional methods to access gem level data or spell calculation results.
Phase 1 validation tests for 4 weapon builds. Must continue to pass after spell enhancements (AC-2.9.2.6).
Utility script for inspecting gem data structure and grantedEffect.levels. Useful for Task 1 research.
Reference implementation for spell damage calculation. MinimalCalc needs to replicate subset of this logic for spell base damage, effectiveness, and DOT.

python.package: Python-LuaJIT bindings for PoB calculation engine
Process isolation for LuaJIT Windows exceptions

lua.module: Embedded runtime for PoB calculation modules
lua.datafile: Gem progression data (438KB, already loaded at line 415)

constraints.constraint: Zero modifications to Epic 1 calculator API - maintain API stability
No changes to build_calculator.py routing logic (already operational from Story 2.9.1)
Preserve weapon build functionality - all Phase 1 tests must pass
Performance target: <500ms per calculation for any build type
Use existing PoB data files (Data/Gems.lua already loaded at line 415)
Follow layered architecture: MinimalCalc.lua calculation layer, no business logic
Separate spell logic from attack logic in code to prevent regressions
Implement iteratively: Start with ONE spell build before expanding

interface.name: skillFlags
interface.signature: skillFlags = { attack: bool, spell: bool, projectile: bool, hit: bool }

tests.standards: Integration tests for Epic 2 validation using pytest framework. Realistic build fixtures test coverage. Performance benchmarking with pytest-benchmark (<500ms target). Process isolation with pytest-xdist for LuaJIT Windows exception handling. Regression tests must pass before marking story complete.

ideas.test: Test spell base damage extraction from grantedEffect.levels for witch_frost_mage_91
Verify spell effectiveness multiplier applied correctly
Test spell crit and cast speed modifiers
Test DOT damage calculation for witch_essence_drain_86
Verify ailment damage formulas (ignite/poison/bleed if applicable)
Test totem damage calculation for titan_totem_90
Integration test: All 11 spell/DOT/totem builds produce DPS > 0
Regression test: 4 weapon builds from Phase 1 still working
DPS stability check: Within 5% variance for weapon builds
